footer.tagline: Crafting sweet and professional digital experiences. Specializing in Bio Links and performance-optimized website designs.

about.desc: I am Hugo — a dreamer who codes. Born in 2004 and growing up in a cold digital world of logic, I always strive to create warm, poetic, and emotional spaces. To me, every digital product is a small planet where every detail and button is carefully crafted to warm the hearts of my companions.

slide1.desc: Welcome to the creative space of <1>{{name}}</1>. Where I combine delicate artistry and technical power to create top-notch digital products.

slide2.desc: Web development is the journey of turning creative ideas into vivid websites. It's not just about pure coding; web development requires high aesthetic thinking combined with optimal technical solutions to bring perfect user experiences.

slide3.hsSub: Where my programming mindset was forged and nurtured
slide3.hsAddress: 8 Bis Hung Vuong St., My Tho, Dong Thap
slide3.v1d: Perseverance through challenges, strong willpower, and deep self-driven learning.
slide3.v2d: Sharp critical thinking, problem-solving, and independent research.
slide3.v3d: Solid mathematical logic and fundamental algorithms.

slide4.desc: Jason Phan is my companion on the learning and project development journey. We combine system thinking and passion for technology to turn complex ideas into smooth, optimized applications.
slide4.highSchoolDesc: Dynamic high school in Kien Giang.
slide4.uniDesc: International training environment affiliated with Greenwich UK.

slide5.desc: I aim to fully support students in building their digital personal brand. Every registered account using an educational email ending with <1>.edu</1> will automatically activate a fully customizable Bio page for free.
slide5.check1: Automatic educational email verification in 3 seconds.
slide5.check2: Support creating beautiful custom links (e.g., bio/your-name).
slide5.check3: Bio Link validity period of 12 months.
slide5.b1d: Customize the layout, effects, background and every social link — your own digital business card.
slide5.b2d: Like bio/your-name — memorable and professional on your CV, Facebook or Instagram.
slide5.b3d: Just an email ending in .edu — the system verifies instantly, no manual review.
slide5.b4d: Bạn Học Đường, Hugo PSY, Web IDE, Hugo Radio and Aura AI — free for a full 12 months.
slide5.flipHint: Hover or tap to flip the card

slide6.desc: I develop web applications with a philosophy of lean source code, fast loading, optimal smooth motion effects, and SEO standards to help your brand best reach users.

slide7.desc: After stressful coding hours, my greatest passion is admiring and taking care of fern pots. Their intense vitality and primitive beauty bring endless peace.

slide8.quote: "Crafting experiences with all my heart. Every line of code must have a soul, bringing surprise and sweetness."
slide8.wowDesc: I believe digital interfaces shouldn't be emotionless. Every button, info card, or scroll effect must be coated with delicate animations to stimulate excitement.
slide8.sweetDesc: The smoothness and consistency in color palettes, design spacing, and instantaneous database responses create a complete and secure whole for the experiencer.
slide8.p1: Put the heart at the center of the experience.
slide8.p2: Minimize external libraries to achieve 100% performance.
slide8.p3: Synchronize design language from start to finish.

slide9.title: Connect with Hugo
slide9.desc: Click on the icons below to connect directly to my official social media and communication channels.

slide10.desc: Create stunning student link pages completely free, or connect with me to design professional Bespoke websites today.

studio.desc: Hugo Studio is a digital craft workshop — where every website, Bio page and student utility is polished like a little work of art: beautiful, smooth and warm to its users.

partners.desc: I'm Hugo — a final-year Software Engineering student at Greenwich Vietnam. I built this website to serve as my personal portfolio, share helpful utilities for the student community, and directly handle freelance projects to gain practical experience. Jason Phan accompanies me as co-development partner.
partners.motto: Crafting experiences with all my heart

discoveries.desc: Utilities I built by hand — from AI and music to mental-wellness support — all free for students.
discoveries.auraDesc: A gentle AI companion that helps you focus on studying and sparks creative inspiration.
discoveries.psyDesc: A listening friend for whatever is on your mind — supporting your mental well-being, especially late at night.
discoveries.hocduongDesc: A shared study space: exchange documents, ask questions and connect with the student community.
discoveries.radioDesc: A soothing lofi radio station for your late-night study sessions.
discoveries.ideDesc: Write and run code right in your browser — even on your phone.
discoveries.arcadeDesc: Retro games and multiplayer chess to unwind after stressful study sessions.
discoveries.joyDesc: The JOY rewards wallet — earn and spend points across the whole ecosystem.
discoveries.bioDesc: A one-of-a-kind personal page that reflects your true style and knowledge.

meta.title: Affordable Website Design & Pricing | Hugo Studio
meta.description: Affordable websites at Hugo Studio: fixes from 150k VND, landing pages 690k, full websites 1.9M, dynamic web apps 6.9M. SEO, speed-ups, mobile-first. Clear quotes before any work starts.
meta.keywords: affordable website design, cheap website Vietnam, website pricing, landing page design, website fixes, SEO optimization, website speed up, web app, Hugo Studio

whispers.intro: There is no perfect website. Only the right one.
whispers.between1: Every bug is a signal. Listen to it.
whispers.between2: Speed isn't the goal. Speed is the prerequisite.
whispers.between3: A beautiful site that loads slowly is color on canvas at dusk — lovely, but no one sees it.
whispers.between4: From one page to a whole world. The first step is the only one you need to worry about.
whispers.between5: Only when the world can find you do you truly exist online.
whispers.climax: And then, the website doesn't just talk — it thinks, it decides, it works for you.
whispers.closing: Every number is a door. Which one will you open?

hero.title1: A website with a clear goal,
hero.title2: at a clear price up front.
hero.desc: Pick what matches your situation: build new, fix an existing site, or just one small task. Every package locks scope, timeline and cost before work starts.

pricingPhilosophy.title: Thoughts from a Student Freelancer
pricingPhilosophy.desc: I am a final-year Software Engineering student. This website serves as my personal portfolio, a community platform sharing tools for students, and a space where I work directly with clients. Operating 1-1 without any middleman or corporate overhead allows me to offer pricing that fits small businesses, individuals, and student projects.
pricingPhilosophy.philosophy: To ensure the best quality, I only accept 1 project at a time. I only move to the next project in the queue when the current one is near completion. All items, timelines, and costs are discussed upfront with absolute clarity and no hidden fees.

pricing.title: Three investment levels,
pricing.desc: Listed prices are starting points. Once your scope is clear, I confirm the exact items, timeline and deliverables before starting.

stone1.desc: It starts when you notice — something needs fixing. I come in, find the exact spot, and heal it. That's the first time you feel your website touched by someone who loves it.

stone2.desc: A beautiful site no one has seen? Now I turn the lights on. It gets fast, Google finds you, and customers feel the quality from the very first visit.

stone3.desc: A single page. A single story. You look your customer in the eye through the screen and they say: 'Yes, you're the one I've been looking for.'

stone4.desc: Your complete face to the world. Every page is a story, every link an opportunity. The website doesn't just talk — it *invites* people into your world.

stone5.desc: The website doesn't just talk — it lives. It thinks, it decides, it works for you 24/7. That's when technology becomes your software, no longer just a tool.

fix.label: Quick fix
fix.name: Fix an existing site
fix.note: Each task quoted up front, pay when it's done — no hidden extras.
fix.desc: Site running but small bugs are costing you customers? I fix exactly what needs fixing — no big package required.
includes: A quote per task first — work starts only when you approve
Fixed and tested on both phone and desktop
Free 7-day warranty on the exact bug fixed
All files and access handed back when done
excludes: Full redesign of the whole site (see the build packages)
Domain and hosting fees — I'll hook them up for free

seo.label: Optimize
seo.name: SEO & speed-up
seo.note: Best for React/Next.js sites, or any site that's slow and hard to find on Google.
seo.desc: A pretty site that's slow and invisible on Google is a shop without a sign. This package fixes exactly that.
includes: Speed tune-up: compressed images, cleaned code, caching and lazy-load on
On-page SEO: metadata, rich share previews, schema markup
Google Search Console setup, sitemap and robots.txt submitted
Optimization for your 5 key pages (or the whole site if it's small)
Before–after PageSpeed report with recommended next steps
A walkthrough of what to optimize next if you want to keep going

landing.label: Start
landing.name: One-page landing page
landing.note: Custom design, no mass-market templates. Done in 5-7 days.
landing.desc: One page, one goal: visitors finish reading and want to contact you.
includes: 1 page custom-designed to your brand, up to 7 sections
2 revision rounds based on your feedback
Contact form, click-to-call, or direct Zalo/Messenger chat
Basic SEO: metadata, rich share previews, mobile-friendly
Deployed live with your domain hooked up
A 30-minute hands-on walkthrough over Zalo
Free bug support for 14 days after handover
excludes: Domain & hosting fees (~300-500k/year — you buy them, I'll help you choose)
Copy and images — you provide them, I polish and design
Booking or online payment systems → see the Website Pro package

website.label: Grow
website.name: Multi-page website
website.note: Final price depends on pages and features, tailored to your budget with step-by-step payments.
website.desc: A complete online presence that makes a small shop, café or personal brand more trustworthy than a Facebook page.
includes: 4-6 finished pages: home, about, products/services, news (optional), contact
Cohesive design matched to your brand (logo placement, colors, fonts...)
3 revision rounds based on your feedback
Advanced SEO: Google Search Console, sitemap, schema markup
Zalo, Messenger, Google Maps + advanced contact forms
1 month of free maintenance (4 small tweaks included)
A 30-minute training session + 14 days of post-handover support
excludes: Yearly domain & hosting fees (~300-800k, sourced externally)
Blog copywriting and product photography — you provide those
Booking management, online payments → Web System (the advanced package)

system.label: System
system.name: Dynamic web app
system.note: Projects with payments, dashboards or multiple roles usually run 12-20 million.
system.desc: Not just a brochure — a website that works for you: taking orders, bookings and managing customers.
includes: 1 core flow of your choice: bookings OR basic orders
Admin dashboard: orders, customers, key numbers
Login with 2 permission levels: owner and staff
1 data connection: Google Sheet or Zalo
Full source code handover — the site is your asset
1 month of technical support after handover
excludes: Online payment gateways (PayOS, Momo, Stripe) → separate add-on, roughly 1-3M
VIP membership, points & loyalty programs → separate add-on
Monthly domain & VPS costs (~300k-1M/month, sourced externally)

exclusiveBio.label: Students
exclusiveBio.name: Exclusive Bio Page
exclusiveBio.note: Bespoke design — no one else will have the same page.
exclusiveBio.desc: A standalone personal bio page with a unique design custom-made for you. Optimized for internships, scholarships, or networking — everything on one elegant page.
includes: Exclusive bio page design — uniquely yours, not shared with anyone
Up to 5 links (GitHub, LinkedIn, portfolio, socials...)
About section (summary, interests, select skills)
Beautiful responsive design (Desktop & Mobile)

bug.label: Students
bug.name: Coursework Bug Fix
bug.note: Quick quotes based on coursework criteria. Speed delivery before deadlines.
bug.desc: Logic errors, DB connection issue or broken layout in your end-of-term assignment? I'll fix it for you.
includes: Fix exact logic code errors or styling bugs agreed upon
Zalo walkthrough on how to deploy on free hosting (Vercel/Render)
3 days of stability warranty
Full working code handover

bento.label: Students
bento.name: Bento CV / Portfolio
bento.note: Modern Bento Grid design. Tailored for internship, scholarship, or study abroad applications.
bento.desc: Showcase your achievements, projects, Git links and profile in a beautiful Apple-inspired aesthetic.
includes: 1 Bento Grid page layout, up to 7 sections max
Github, social media, and contact link integration
Contact form dumping messages directly to a free Google Sheet
Deploy on free hosting for life (Vercel/Netlify)

html.label: HTML/CSS/JS
html.name: Web App Coursework (HTML)
html.note: Static HTML/CSS/JS coursework. Split the bill from ~295k/member (group of 2).
html.desc: Perfect for Web Design basics, building responsive layouts, static assignment templates.
includes: Responsive layout design compatible with mobile devices
DOM animation effects & basic native Javascript
Detailed README setup documentation for local run
Clean source code + free deployment setup guidance

php.label: PHP/SQL
php.name: Web App Coursework (PHP)
php.note: Dynamic PHP/MySQL coursework. Split the bill from ~495k/member (group of 3).
php.desc: Perfect for Database Web basics, dynamic data CRUD, registering & logins.
includes: Dynamic server handling with PHP + MySQL database
Simple registration, login, and authorization logic
Pre-loaded mock database (Seed Data) for quick demo
Bonus: 1 live call session for setup guidance and live run demo

react.label: React/Node
react.name: Web App Coursework (REACT)
react.note: Full-stack React/Node.js coursework. Split the bill from ~620k/member (group of 4).
react.desc: Perfect for Advanced Web, React SPA, REST APIs, MongoDB/PostgreSQL.
includes: React SPA architecture + Node.js/Express REST API Backend
Bonus: 1 live call session (45 mins) explaining code structure
Pre-loaded mock database (Seed Data) for quick demo
Dedicated help with setting up execution environments

demo.title: Try out
demo.desc: These demos run live right in your browser — pick an industry to see how I structure layout, color and experience for each type of website.
demo.hint: Like one of these? Message me with its name and I'll tailor it to your brand.

care.title: No rebuild needed —
care.desc: If your site only needs a few fixes or a speed boost, you shouldn't pay for a full package.

micro.title: Bite-sized Services
micro.desc: Quick help for minor website adjustments. Transparent quotes, prompt delivery, and absolutely no hidden fees!
micro.customTitle: Got a unique idea or custom request?
micro.customDesc: Don't worry! Hugo is always happy to tackle custom hourly tasks or specialized web requests. Let's chat!

app.desc: Like hiring someone to run your page — taking orders, booking slots, reporting — but you pay once and it runs 24/7.
app.extendTitle: Extensions when you need them — quoted separately
app.extendDesc: Online payments, multiple roles, custom APIs. These projects usually run 12-20 million; scope is confirmed in writing before work starts.

student.desc: A dedicated community space for learners: once verified you can use a personal Bio page, study tools, a support bot and a Q&A community.

items.title: Personal Bio
items.desc: A page introducing yourself with social, study and mini-portfolio links.

items.title: Study tools
items.desc: Notes, Q&A, resources and utilities for self-study.

items.title: Personal support bot
items.desc: Quick answers, study tips, reminders and everyday help.

items.title: Q&A community
items.desc: A space to ask about homework and projects, and get direction within support scope.

process.title: Clear steps,
process.desc: You always know which step you're on, what it costs and what you'll receive.
steps: You send your needs, current site or idea.
I advise on the approach and give a clear quote first.
We lock scope and timeline, then work in milestones.
Handover with guidance, plus support for small tweaks.

faq.title: Quick questions,
faq.desc: Common questions before starting a web project with Hugo Studio.

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: A quick fix starts around $12, a shop-starter landing page around $57, and a multi-page website around $115 (converted from VND at the live rate). The final price is agreed 1-1 to fit exactly what you need. As an IT student working directly with you, there are no middlemen and no overhead — soft prices without compromising quality.

items.q: Why is it affordable while maintaining good quality?
items.a: As a final-year IT student, I develop everything directly without administrative overhead. I focus on quality, provide live interactive demos for you to test, and offer dedicated post-handover support.

items.q: What does "From" pricing mean — will costs balloon?
items.a: "From" is the price for the scope listed under "What you get" in each package. Anything outside that (the "Not included" list) gets a separate written quote before any work — once agreed, nothing extra is added.

items.q: Can you build it if I don't have a design yet?
items.a: Yes. Just describe your field, goals and a few reference sites. I'll propose the content structure, layout and approach.
Yes. Every new build includes metadata, content structure, speed and basic share previews. Deeper work is split into a separate optimization item.

items.q: Do you help with domain and hosting?
items.a: Yes. I can advise on or set up domain, hosting, SSL and deployment if you don't have infrastructure yet.
Yes. I walk you through the site, answer questions and fix issues within the agreed scope.

finalCta.title2: I'll suggest the leanest way forward.
finalCta.desc: Share your current site, a screenshot of the bug, or just an idea. I'll tell you honestly whether you need a small fix, a landing page, a multi-page site or a web app.
finalCta.cta: Message me for a free consult

promo.title: Free Aesthetic Bio Page for Students!
promo.desc: Got an .edu email? Claim your gorgeous ad-free personal bio page for free!

bug-ui.name: Squish Interface Bugs
bug-ui.desc: Fix broken buttons, misaligned images, font size oopsies, or overlapping text elements.

style-content.name: Colors & Copy Polish
style-content.desc: Modify brand colors, swap typography, update avatar graphics, or rewrite text sections.

mobile-beauty.name: Mobile Glow-up
mobile-beauty.desc: Optimize spacing, responsive fonts, and call-to-action touch zones for mobile screens.

web-widget.name: Sweet Widgets
web-widget.desc: Integrate cute Zalo/Messenger floating chats, contact forms, Google Maps, or click-to-call hotlines.

deploy-domain.name: Web Launch
deploy-domain.desc: Deploy your site to Vercel/Netlify/VPS, connect custom domains, and secure with a free SSL certificate.

seo-quick.name: Quick SEO Boost
seo-quick.desc: Set correct meta tags (Title/Desc) and configure pretty link previews for Facebook/Zalo sharing.

speed-optimize.name: Speed Boost
speed-optimize.desc: Lossless compression for heavy images, clean up redundant JS/CSS files, and push up PageSpeed scores.

monthly-maintenance.name: Monthly Cozy Care
monthly-maintenance.desc: Routine backups, security checkups, quick bug hotfixes, and light content revisions every month.

servicesPage.disclaimer: * Sweet note: All prices are starting guides. The final price is tailored to your scope during our 1-1 chat, ensuring no surprise fees!

section.newBuildsDesc: For brands, creators, and businesses needing a brand new website built from the ground up.
section.optimizeDesc: For existing websites that need better Google rankings, faster load times, or technical bugs resolved.

header.desc: Have questions about Hugo Studio? Below are the most frequently asked questions. If you still can't find an answer, don't hesitate to contact us directly!

faqs.question: Does Hugo Studio have fixed working hours?
faqs.answer: I work directly 1-1, so there are no rigid working hours. Feel free to message me anytime, and I will get back to you as soon as possible!

faqs.question: How many members are in the Hugo Studio team?
faqs.answer: I am Hugo, a final-year Software Engineering student and the primary developer. I collaborate with Jason Phan (co-development partner) on technical discussions and optimizing the full-stack experience.

faqs.question: Is there any promotional or trial policy at Hugo Studio?
faqs.answer: Understanding that students desire a professional personal brand, I support creating customized Bio Portfolios completely free for students with .edu or .edu.vn educational emails.

faqs.question: How is the design cost at Hugo Studio?
faqs.answer: Since I work directly 1-1, the pricing is highly affordable and tailored to students or small businesses. To maintain quality, I only accept 1 project at a time in a queue.

faqs.question: Does Hugo Studio work on holidays?
faqs.answer: When there is a long holiday, I will post an update directly on the homepage. (Secret: Sometimes I take a short trip to recharge 🏖️)

contact.title: Still have questions?
contact.desc: Don't worry! Send a direct message to the Hugo Studio team for a detailed 1:1 answer.

toast.success: Your request has been sent successfully! I will contact you within 24 hours.
toast.error: An error occurred while sending the form. Please try again later.
toast.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet and try again.

header.title: Book a Design.
header.desc: I work directly 1-1 and only accept 1 project at a time to ensure the highest quality. Please briefly sketch your needs, and I will contact you via Zalo/Email within 24 hours to discuss details, provide a quote, and place your project in the queue.

features.title: Exclusive ideas
features.desc: No cookie-cutter templates. Interfaces are tailor-made to fit brand formats.

features.title: Performance & SEO
features.desc: Clean code, Apple-standard optimization for fast loading and good Google rankings.

features.title: 1-on-1 Zalo support
features.desc: Direct and quick communication. Committed to lifetime maintenance and bug fixes.

form.messagePlaceholder: Share your desires about interface, features or personal ideas...
form.disclaimer: I provide online services. Your information will be kept strictly confidential and used only to make consulting Zalo calls.

hero.desc: Surf through silent galaxies. Each website is a unique star.

core.desc: At the center of Hugo Studio's universe is a logo converging 6 colorful bands, a powerful statement of limitless creativity and pioneering aspiration:
core.redText: Represents burning enthusiasm, intense passion, and dedication in every line of code.
core.orangeText: Symbolizes positive energy, dynamism, and a constant desire for innovation.
core.yellowText: Shines with optimism, bringing trust and prosperity to every client.
core.greenText: A symbol of sustainable growth, always multiplying and developing strongly.
core.blueText: The core of technology, representing absolute prestige, transparency, and professionalism.
core.purpleText: Far-sighted vision, mystery, and the ability to create artistic breakthroughs.

typography.title: Typography Choice
typography.displayDesc: Modern and definitive, like clear constellations in the night sky. Used for large headings.
typography.bodyDesc: Minimalist, refined, and smooth. Guides the eye through text like the orbits of planets.

confirm.deletePersonal: Confirm completely deleting the Personal Bio? This action cannot be undone.

toast.verifySuccessMsg: Your educational email has been confirmed. Welcome to Hugo Studio!

utilitiesPage.title: DIGITAL UTILITIES ECOSYSTEM
utilitiesPage.desc: Explore digital tools to personalize your brand, configure NFC writing, share contacts rapidly, and generate professional email signatures.

nfc.title: Smart QR Generator
nfc.desc: Generate and download custom QR codes. People who scan the code will access information or configure settings instantly.
nfc.simDesc: Simulated preview of the personal plastic NFC card after printing.
nfc.writeDirectDesc: Tap your physical NFC card against your phone to write the Bio Link instantly.
nfc.scanning: Looking for card reader... Tap NFC tag on the back of your phone.
nfc.scanningHint: Place NFC tag on the back of your phone...
nfc.success: NFC tag written successfully! Tap it on any smartphone to test.
nfc.toastUnsupported: Safari (iOS) and desktops do not support direct NFC writing from Web. Please use the App for professional writing.
nfc.guideTitle: NFC App Guide (For iOS / iPadOS / Desktop)
nfc.guideDesc: Due to Apple's security policy, iPhone and Safari do not support direct web writing. Write via a free app in 4 easy steps:
nfc.step1Desc: Download the free app NFC TOOLS from App Store (iOS) or Play Store (Android).
nfc.step1DescIOS: Open App Store → search 'NFC Tools' → Download for free.
nfc.step2Desc: Open the app, select WRITE tab - Tap ADD A RECORD - Select URL / URI.
nfc.step3Desc: Copy your public Bio Link above, paste it into the field, and tap OK.
nfc.step4Desc: Tap WRITE / 5 BYTES - Hold the physical NFC card near the top of your phone's back.
nfc.unsupportedIOS: iOS/Safari doesn't support Web NFC yet. Please use the NFC Tools App via the guide below.
nfc.unsupportedDesktop: Web NFC only works on Android Chrome. Please use the App or switch to an Android phone.

vcard.title: Smart Contacts (vCard)
vcard.desc: Download your contact card file, or get a link to embed the "Save Contact" button on your Bio page.
vcard.mobileInstructionDesc: You are accessing via mobile device! Tap DOWNLOAD & SAVE CONTACTS NOW on the left. The browser will download the `.vcf` file. Once downloaded, open it and the iOS/Android system will automatically display the interface to save contact.
vcard.desktopInstructionDesc: You are using a computer. To add this contact to your phone fastest: Open CAMERA ON PHONE and scan the adjacent QR code. The phone will automatically recognize and prompt you to save the contact immediately.
vcard.publicLinkDesc: Use this link to embed a "Save Contact" button on your Bio page.
vcard.syncDesc: Use automated features to gather contacts from your phone or Google account with just one permission.
vcard.syncWarning: * Auto-sync on Android. For iOS, please select the .vcf file exported from your contacts.
vcard.syncQrTitle: Scan QR to Sync from Phone
vcard.syncQrDesc: Use your phone to scan this QR code to access the Utilities page, then press SYNC NOW to upload your old phone's contacts to the cloud.
vcard.restoreDesc: When changing phones or losing devices, just log in here from your new device/desktop and download this pack to restore all contacts.
vcard.emptyBackup: No matching backed up phone numbers found.
vcard.toastUnsupported: Please use a modern browser to sync contacts.
vcard.toastFillRequired: Please enter name and phone number.
vcard.toastSyncSuccess: Successfully synced {{count}} new contacts to the cloud! 🎉
vcard.toastSyncError: Sync error. Please check your file or access permissions.
vcard.syncedStatusDesc: Contacts are backed up. Press Update to re-sync.

signature.title: Brand Email Signature
signature.desc: Create a highly professional and luxury personalized Gmail/Outlook email signature, with a QR code or Bio Link button.
signature.instructionDesc: After copying and opening the settings links above, scroll down to the SIGNATURE section and press CTRL+V (or CMD+V) to paste this signature.
signature.toastCopySuccess: Email signature copied in Rich Text format! 🎉
signature.toastCopyError: Unable to automatically copy. Please select the signature and copy manually.

techbadges.title: Tech Stack Badges
techbadges.desc: Select your technologies to generate sleek, monochrome SVG badge markdown or HTML for your Bio/Readme.

githubstats.title: GitHub Profile Cards
githubstats.desc: Input your GitHub username to generate elegant stats, languages, and streak cards for your profile.

signature.name: Signature Portfolio
signature.benefit1: 12-Month Duration: Use bio link completely free for 1 year from activation.
signature.benefit2: Unique Portfolio Design: Express professional identity through clean Portfolio layout.
signature.benefit3: Optimal UX/UI Layout: Engage partners and customers with easy-to-read designs.
signature.benefit4: Ultra-Fast Speed: Instant load times optimized via clean code and modern media optimization.

ultimate.name: Ultimate Web App
ultimate.benefit1: 12-Month Duration: Use bio link completely free for 1 year from activation.
ultimate.benefit2: Superior Web App Experience: Transform your Bio Link into a premium, smooth web app.
ultimate.benefit3: Optimal UX/UI Layout: Engage partners and customers with easy-to-read designs.
ultimate.benefit4: Ultra-Fast Speed: Instant load times optimized via clean code and modern media optimization.

student.name: Student Bio
student.benefit1: 12-Month Duration: Use bio link completely free for 1 year from activation.
student.benefit2: 3 Unique Themes: Choose from elegant Classic, bold Brutalism, or colorful Flat layouts.
student.benefit3: Ultra-Fast Speed: Instant load times optimized via clean code and modern media optimization.
student.benefit4: Unlimited Connections: Share up to 5 main social links to reach customers effectively.

free.name: Free Bio
free.benefit1: 12-Month Duration: Use bio link completely free for 1 year from activation.
free.benefit2: Classic Profile Layout: Traditional, clean, and distraction-free Bio Link layout.
free.benefit3: No Spam Ads: Zero advertisements for clean, reader-friendly, and optimal interface.

settings.title: Settings

page.weatherBgDesc: Lively by day & in storms, auto-off on clear nights to save battery.

infoVersion.title: Info & Version
infoVersion.desc: About Hugo Studio, the current version, and a small reward just for you.
infoVersion.aboutBody: Hugo Studio is a personal Bio-link platform combined with a versatile utility toolkit, built so everyone can find their own corner that fits their personality and pace of life — there's no one-size-fits-all here.
infoVersion.aboutBody2: From your personal Bio page and a daily JOY rewards system, to utilities like HugoHelpdesk, HugoHandle, HugoPSY, HugoCoder, HugoRadio, HugoArcade and HugoAura — every tool lives in one place, so you can build your personal image, work, study and unwind without switching between different apps.

bio.title: Personal Bio page
bio.desc: Your own profile, links and services page — customize the design and share it with a single link.

helpdesk.title: HugoHelpdesk
helpdesk.desc: Smart QR/NFC codes and a professional email signature for sharing your contact info quickly.

handle.title: HugoHandle
handle.desc: Password-protected secure links and an online image converter/compressor.

psychology.title: HugoPSY
psychology.desc: AI-assisted study counseling, sleep tracking, and emotional therapy support.

ide.title: HugoCoder
ide.desc: A multi-language code editor with code suggestions and beginner programming lessons.

radio.title: HugoRadio
radio.desc: Vietnamese and international news radio plus online music channels, free.

arcade.title: HugoArcade
arcade.desc: 2048, Caro, Chess, Hugo Snake and more mini games — play to earn JOY.

aura.title: HugoAura
aura.desc: A Pomodoro focus space with relaxing nature sounds and therapy audio.

step1.title: Complete your Bio profile
step1.desc: Add a profile photo, your personal info, and important links in the Profile tab.

step2.title: Explore the Utilities
step2.desc: Open the Utilities tab to pick the tool that fits you — each utility serves a different need.

step3.title: Earn JOY every day
step3.desc: Check in daily, complete missions, and play mini games in HugoArcade to build up JOY.

step4.title: Share your Bio page
step4.desc: Use your public link or the QR/NFC code from HugoHelpdesk to share your page with anyone.

infoVersion.versionNote: Continuously updated with new features — thank you for being part of Hugo Studio.
infoVersion.bonusDesc: Thanks for visiting Info & Version — here's a small JOY gift.
infoVersion.bonusError: Couldn't claim the bonus right now.

crisis.title: You're not alone
crisis.desc: Our system noticed you may be going through a hard time. If you're in immediate danger, call 115 (Emergency) or go to the nearest medical facility now. Reach out to a trusted family member or friend to be with you.
crisis.imSafe: I'm safe / I've reached out for help

profile.title: Personal Information
profile.missingInfo: * Some information is missing. Chat with AI to update more.
profile.noChartData: Not enough chart data. Please take more tests.
profile.lowMoodDesc: Recorded {{count}} check-ins with fatigue or exhaustion continuously.
profile.recHigh: Warning: Your mental health indicators show signs of serious clinical instability. Please contact a psychologist or medical clinic immediately.
profile.recMedium: Note: System detected minor stress. Please rest, sleep well, and continue chatting with Companion Specialist.
profile.recNormal: Good news: Your emotions and lifestyle indicators are extremely stable. Keep up this positive energy!

evaluation.lateNightDesc: Detected {{count}} activities after 11 PM, risking sleep cycle disruption.
evaluation.mmpiLowReliabilityDesc: There are {{count}} MMPI test results with suspected reliability of the L-F-K index.
evaluation.uploadErrorDesc: Recorded {{count}} file uploads of non-standard formats.
evaluation.recHigh: Your mental health indicators show signs of serious clinical instability. I recommend you reduce school/work load, practice 4-7-8 deep breathing nightly, and chat with me more often. If this persists for over 2 weeks, contact a professional psychologist or medical clinic immediately.
evaluation.recMedium: I noticed some light stress and imbalance in your daily routines. Please rest, get enough sleep, and share your feelings with me whenever you are tired.
evaluation.recNormal: Your emotions and lifestyle indicators have been extremely good and balanced recently. Please maintain this positive energy, breathe evenly, and chat with me when needed!

nfc.step1: Enable NFC connection on your mobile phone.

vcard.title: Smart vCard Contacts
vcard.desc: Enter your info to create a vCard contact file. Other users can scan the QR code to save your contact information into their phone directory instantly.
vcard.qrCodeTitle: VCARD QR CODE FOR OFFLINE SCAN
vcard.qrCodeDesc: Use phone camera to scan this code to quickly save contacts without internet.
vcard.autoMechanismDesc: Due to iOS/Android security, a website cannot automatically save contact cards directly onto a user's phone without explicit confirmation. This QR code wraps a standard VCF payload, prompting a 'Save Contact' popup once scanned.
vcard.downloadVcfDesc: Download standard VCF file to current device.
vcard.shareDesc: Send contact card via AirDrop, Zalo, SMS...
vcard.copyDesc: Copy permanent direct vCard download link.

signature.title: Branded Email Signature
signature.desc: Automatically design customized professional signatures matching Hugo Studio. Copy and paste directly into Gmail, Outlook, or Apple Mail signature settings.
signature.emailBody: I have attached my contact details below.
signature.copiedText: Signature copied! Paste (Ctrl+V/Cmd+V) directly into Gmail/Outlook. ✉️

secretLink.title: Lock Secure Links
secretLink.desc: Create password-protected links. Only those with the correct password can access your secret contents or resources.
secretLink.infoDesc: You can create a special link requiring users to enter a password to redirect to the destination (Google Drive, private photoshoot, internal docs). Max 5 links.
secretLink.emptyList: You have not created any Secure Links yet.
secretLink.toastLimit: You can only create up to 5 secure links!
secretLink.toastValidation: Please enter Target URL and Password!

studentBenefitsPage.title: Your Dream Bio Link
studentBenefitsPage.desc: Are you an IT student, an artist, or a creator waiting to be discovered? Claim your beautiful, ad-free Bento bio page. It is your home on the web to show off who you are!
studentBenefitsPage.verificationDesc: Use your school email (.edu or .edu.vn) to login. Our robot will instantly recognize you and hand over the key!

creative.title: Creative Playground

yours.desc: Custom subdomain link. No cookie-cutter templates, no generic boxes. Stand out!
